title: Create: Chromatic Legacy
description: Brings back old features of Create mod: Shadow Steel tools and Chromatic Compound Recipe.
body:
# Create: Chromatic Legacy

Brings back old Create mod features: Shadow Steel tools and Chromatic Compound recipe

## Items

**Chromatic Compound**: A material used to make Refined Radiance and Shadow steel.

*   To make a Refined Radiance, drop it into a beacon's beam.
*   To make a Shadow Steel, drop it into the void.

**Shadow Steel tools**(Pickaxe, Sword, Garden Mattock(Axe+Shovel+Hoe combined)): Powerful tools that destroy drops.

*   Blocks broken by them won't drop.
*   Mobs killed by them also won't loot anything. but they drop some experience depending on Looting enchantment levels.
*   Shadow Steel Pickaxe + Efficiency V + Haste II can insta-mine deepslate or end stone.

## Credits

*   Textures by **simibubi and Creators of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**
*   Made with Mcreator
